message:
feat(mvcc): add lazy page-data builder to avoid materializing bytes on busy path

- Add concurrent_write_page_with() accepting FnOnce() -> PageData so the
  page payload is only constructed after the page lock is successfully
  acquired; the existing concurrent_write_page() delegates to it for
  backward compatibility
- Update SharedTxnPageIo::write_page() in the VDBE engine to use the new
  lazy builder, eliminating a redundant PageData::from_vec() clone on
  every busy-retry iteration
- Add test verifying the builder closure is never called when the page
  lock is contested (busy path), and that no staged bytes or locks leak

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
